allow: Bash(python -c "import tushare as ts; print\('tushare version:', ts.__version__\); funcs = [x for x in dir\(ts\) if 'real' in x.lower\(\) or 'money' in x.lower\(\) or 'fund' in x.lower\(\) or 'flow' in x.lower\(\) or 'tick' in x.lower\(\) or 'min' in x.lower\(\)]; print\('\\nrelevant functions in tushare main:'\); [print\(f'  {f}'\) for f in funcs]")
